title: Envision's AI-Powered Green Ammonia and Hydrogen Project Named Global Benchmark by WEF
content: Envision Energyâ€™s green hydrogen and ammonia project in Chifeng, Inner Mongolia, has been recognized as a premier global case study in a new World Economic Forum (WEF) white paper. The report highlights Envisionâ€™s proprietary AI-driven Power System, which converts intermittent wind and solar energy into a stable power supply, enabling the facility to operate on 100% green electricityâ€”a world first for large-scale production. CEO Lei Zhang described this innovation as transforming the Gobi Desert into a "Green Oil Field," creating a scalable blueprint for clean fuel industrialization. To ensure access to international markets, the project has secured key certifications, including ISCC EU and RFNBO compliance. By optimizing energy variability in real-time, Envisionâ€™s system significantly lowers the levelized cost of hydrogen, reframing renewable energy as a precise industrial tool for global decarbonization.
author: Analysts Account
